metadata.subject: Arts Education
metadata.description: Students advance choreographic skills through creation of substantial original dance works. This course emphasizes sophisticated artistic vision, advanced composition techniques, and the presentation of professional-quality choreography.
metadata.general_description: Advanced choreography course focused on substantial original dance creations.

big_ideas.statement: Advanced choreography demonstrates sophisticated artistic vision and mastery of compositional techniques.
big_ideas.elaboration: Grade 12 choreographers create substantial works that show developed artistic voice, complex compositional structures, and nuanced interpretation of themes.

big_ideas.statement: Professional choreography requires both technical sophistication and collaborative leadership.
big_ideas.elaboration: Advanced choreographers lead artistic teams, manage complex production elements, and communicate artistic vision with clarity and authority.

big_ideas.statement: Choreography at the advanced level engages with meaningful themes and artistic innovation.
big_ideas.elaboration: Grade 12 choreographers explore complex ideas, push artistic boundaries, and create work that challenges performers and audiences.

big_ideas.statement: Advanced choreography is contextualized within professional standards and contemporary practice.
big_ideas.elaboration: Grade 12 students create work that meets professional standards, engages with current artistic conversations, and demonstrates sustained artistic development.

competencies.raw: Create substantial original dance works with artistic sophistication
i_can_statements: I can develop and realize substantial choreographic works of significant length and complexity
I can demonstrate masterful use of advanced compositional techniques
I can create work that engages audiences emotionally and intellectually
I can realize ambitious artistic visions through choreography

competencies.raw: Develop sophisticated artistic vision and conceptual depth
i_can_statements: I can articulate and develop complex artistic concepts
I can translate sophisticated ideas into choreographic form
I can create work with thematic depth and layered meaning
I can develop distinctive artistic voice and perspective

competencies.raw: Integrate advanced technical and performance elements
i_can_statements: I can integrate design, music, and multimedia elements seamlessly
I can choreograph for diverse performer abilities and experience levels
I can create technically demanding choreography with artistic purpose
I can manage complex production elements collaboratively

competencies.raw: Push artistic boundaries and explore innovative approaches
i_can_statements: I can experiment with unconventional choreographic approaches
I can incorporate emerging technologies and interdisciplinary collaborations
I can challenge artistic conventions in purposeful ways
I can develop work that contributes to contemporary dance discourse

competencies.raw: Analyze choreography with sophisticated critical frameworks
i_can_statements: I can conduct detailed analysis of choreographic work using advanced frameworks
I can evaluate artistic choices in relation to broader artistic movements
I can understand how choreography engages with cultural and social contexts
I can recognize innovation and artistic significance in choreographic work

competencies.raw: Reflect on artistic development and evolving vision
i_can_statements: I can articulate how my artistic vision has evolved
I can evaluate the impact and reception of my choreographic work
I can identify my unique contributions to dance discourse
I can reflect on trajectory toward professional practice

competencies.raw: Understand professional standards and industry practices
i_can_statements: I can understand professional choreographic standards and expectations
I can evaluate work against professional benchmarks
I can understand funding, touring, and presentation models
I can recognize professional development and career pathways

competencies.raw: Develop sophisticated understanding of diverse dance traditions
i_can_statements: I can understand historical and cultural contexts of diverse dance traditions
I can analyze how traditions inform contemporary choreographic practice
I can engage respectfully and knowledgeably with diverse traditions
I can appreciate contributions of diverse choreographic voices

competencies.raw: Create professional documentation of choreographic work
i_can_statements: I can create professional-quality video documentation of choreography
I can develop comprehensive notation or documentation systems
I can create artist statements and production materials
I can maintain professional archives of choreographic work

competencies.raw: Lead and communicate artistic vision to collaborators
i_can_statements: I can articulate artistic vision clearly and compellingly
I can lead rehearsals and guide performer development
I can collaborate effectively with designers and technical teams
I can manage artistic direction and production decisions

competencies.raw: Present choreographic work to professional audiences
i_can_statements: I can present work in formal performance and exhibition contexts
I can write artist statements and critical reflections
I can engage audiences in discussions about choreography
I can represent work professionally in various platforms
I can create choreography that communicates complex ideas
I can use movement to engage diverse audiences meaningfully
I can develop audience connections through artistic work
I can contribute to cultural conversations through dance

competencies.raw: Engage with contemporary dance discourse and artistic movements
i_can_statements: I can participate in conversations about contemporary dance
I can understand current artistic movements and debates
I can position my work within contemporary contexts
I can contribute meaningfully to artistic discourse
I can collaborate with artists from other disciplines
I can create integrated multimedia works
I can explore unconventional partnership possibilities
I can develop innovative cross-disciplinary projects
I can create professional portfolio and documentation
I can establish professional networks and relationships
I can understand grant applications and funding opportunities
I can develop professional presence in dance field

competencies.raw: Plan trajectory toward professional dance career
i_can_statements: I can identify professional goals and aspirations
I can develop plan for sustained choreographic practice
I can explore educational and career pathways
I can commit to lifelong artistic development and growth

areas.name: Advanced Choreographic Development
topics: Sophisticated use of thematic material and variations
Integration of complex technical and artistic elements

areas.name: Artistic Vision and Conceptual Development
topics: Deep exploration of meaningful themes and concepts
Cultural and social engagement through dance
Relationship between concept and movement vocabulary

areas.name: Leadership and Collaboration
topics: Collaborating with designers, musicians, and technical staff

areas.name: Professional Practice and Career Development
topics: Understanding dance field and career opportunities
Grant writing and funding for dance projects
